g.text: Existence is model-free; correct-application is cross-vendor (Claude+OpenAI). The residual

text.style: fill: #8a2f2f; font: italic 11px 'TeX Gyre Pagella', 'Palatino', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: limit is now LEGITIMACY (whether a concern is real) — not coverage — which routes to the

text.style: fill: #8a2f2f; font: italic 11px 'TeX Gyre Pagella', 'Palatino', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: domain-expert audit, not the verifier. Directional, synthetic; n=99 / 12 cases. Source: v3-run/coverage.json.
